title: Fix dark mode text contrast on widgets and sections

requirements.text: Fix dark mode contrast so that all text, labels, values, and headings inside KPI cards, chart widgets, and dashboard sections are clearly visible when dark mode is enabled. Ensure CSS custom properties and Tailwind utility classes correctly resolve to high-contrast foreground colors against dark backgrounds across all widget and section components.

quotes: i notice when dark mode is enabled, I am unable to see the words on the widgets or sections

acceptanceCriteria: All text inside KPI cards (title, value, description) is readable in dark mode
Chart labels, axis text, and legend text are visible in dark mode
Section headings and sub-headings on the Dashboard, Reports, and all other pages are readable in dark mode
Table cell text, column headers, and filter labels are visible in dark mode
Badge and status label text is readable in dark mode
No white-on-white or black-on-black text combinations exist anywhere in dark mode
Sidebar navigation link text and icons are clearly visible in dark mode
Header text (app title, user name, role) is clearly visible in dark mode

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Dark mode fix must use the existing CSS custom property design token system defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css — do not introduce hardcoded color values
nonGoals: Adding new dashboard widgets or features
Modifying backend logic or data models
